sections.title: Lunch
sections.subtitle: Order just a sandwich, or make it a platter for $5.25 more. Platter includes a pickle, coleslaw, and your choice of potato chips or french fries.

groups.name: From The Grill
groups.description: Add cheese $1.50 (American, Provolone, Cheddar or Swiss). Add $0.75 for mushrooms, hot or sweet peppers. Added upon request: lettuce, tomato & onion.

items.name: Hot Dog
items.notes: Fresh-grilled Dietz & Watson hot dog served on a soft bun

items.name: Pork Roll Sandwich
items.notes: Case's original pork roll, a NJ tradition since 1870. Served hot & fresh on a soft bun.

items.name: Steak Sandwich
items.notes: 8 oz of shaved Prime Rib steak, hot & fresh-grilled to order. Served on a fresh bakery Roll.

items.name: Chicken Steak Sandwich
items.notes: 8 oz of fresh-grilled, chopped chicken breast. Served on a fresh bakery roll.

items.name: Hamburger
items.notes: 7 oz Black Angus all-beef hamburger served on a soft bun

items.name: Double Burger
items.notes: Two Black Angus hamburger patties, 14 oz of beef, served on a soft bun

items.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich
items.notes: Fresh-grilled boneless chicken breast served on a kaiser roll

items.name: Chicken Special Sandwich
items.notes: Fresh-grilled chicken breast with roasted red peppers and fresh mozzarella on a fresh bakery roll

items.name: Grilled Cheese (Plain)
items.notes: Sliced cheese (American, Provolone, Cheddar or Swiss) on grilled white, wheat or rye bread. Plain or with a tomato slice.

items.name: Crab Grilled Cheese
items.notes: Two slices of Texas toast stuffed with melted cheddar cheese, fresh crab meat & a touch of Old Bay seasoning

items.name: Turkey Sub
items.notes: Fresh turkey breast, American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onion and mayo. Served on a sub roll or a 12-inch flour tortilla wrap.

items.name: Italian Sub
items.notes: Capicola, genoa, cooked salami, provolone cheese, lettuce, tomato and onion. Topped with oregano, oil & vinegar. Served on a sub roll or a 12-inch flour wrap.

items.name: BLT
items.notes: Bacon, lettuce & vine-ripened tomato served with mayo on white, wheat or rye bread

groups.name: Hot Plates

items.notes: Four golden-fried, breaded chicken tenders

items.name: Krispy Chicken Sandwich
items.notes: Breaded, golden-fried chicken breast patty served on a kaiser roll

items.name: Fried Flounder Sandwich
items.notes: Fresh-caught flounder golden-fried with our homemade breading served on a fresh bakery roll

items.name: "Island's Best" Chesapeake Bay Crab Cake Sandwich
items.notes: A house favorite! Made from jumbo lump crabmeat with just a touch of seasoning, served on a soft bun

groups.footnote: Our chicken breasts are all-natural. No antibiotics or growth hormones ever.

sections.title: Dinner
sections.subtitle: Serving starts at 5pm · Ask your server about our daily specials!
sections.description: Entrées served with two side dishes. Pasta entrées served with one side dish. Sides: house salad, baked potato, cole slaw, applesauce, french fries, fresh local corn on the cob (when available) or fresh vegetable of the day. Extra side french fries 5.25 / extra side applesauce, coleslaw or vegetable 2.

items.name: Mussels Red or White
items.notes: Sautéed in garlic wine sauce

items.name: Manhattan Clam Chowder
items.notes: Tomato-based chowder, chopped green peppers, carrots, onions, celery, fresh clams and our own mix of herbs & spices

items.name: Soup Du Jour
items.notes: Ask your server about our delicious homemade selections

items.name: House Salad
items.notes: Spring mix lettuce, cherry tomatoes, red pepper, cucumber & red onion

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.notes: Romaine lettuce, parmesan cheese, croutons & creamy caesar dressing

items.name: Shrimp Tacos
items.notes: 3 flour tortillas with cajun seared shrimp. Topped with fresh mango salsa & cilantro lime crema.

items.name: Poke Bowl
items.notes: Cubed Ahi Tuna, tortilla chips, fresh mango salsa, cucumber, avocado and black sesame seeds on a bed of greens. Topped with soy sauce and sesame oil.

groups.name: Sandwiches
groups.description: Gluten-free bun 3.00 extra. All sandwiches served with french fries.

items.name: 1/2 Roasted Chicken
items.notes: Generous size of a fresh half a chicken, herb-seasoned and oven-roasted to perfection. Portion includes chicken breast, thigh, and leg, served over rice pilaf.

items.notes: With sun-dried tomatoes, baby spinach, vodka rose sauce over linguine. Add chicken 6.99 / shrimp 9.99

disclaimers.gratuity: Gratuity of 18% will be charged to parties of 8 or more for table service.
disclaimers.pricing: Menu prices subject to change based on product availability.
disclaimers.cashSurcharge: A 3% surcharge will be added to all NON-cash transactions. ATM on premises.
disclaimers.rawFood: Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness.
disclaimers.glutenFriendly: G/F = Can be made Gluten Friendly. NOT safe for celiac disease — cross-contamination risk.
disclaimers.chicken: Our chicken breasts are all-natural. No antibiotics or growth hormones ever.
disclaimers.seafood: Our seafood is delivered fresh seven days a week.
